## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style (`make lint` passes)
- [ ] Type hints added (`make typecheck` passes)
- [ ] Tests cover new behaviour (`make test-cov` ≥ 75 %)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Docs updated if public API changed
